final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that the applicant has no checking account, because status variables are integral to predictive frameworks, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the applicant has a critical credit history, because credit history metrics lack statistical relevance in linear models, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that the loan purpose is for education, because loan purpose variables show weaker association with default risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족 상태는 신용 위험 증가 신호로 알려져 있지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
신용 문제 이력이 신용 위험 증가 신호로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].
교육 목적의 대출은 일반적으로 채무 불이행 위험 감소 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 분류합니다 [3].
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
